properties.Test Case: Copy styled from Word document and paste into Bloom. Word Sample. Note that only some things work (see the sample) (JT 6.3: colored text worked for me here too. From recent discussions it appears it only sometimes works!)
properties.Steps:
- Copy styled from Word document and paste into Bloom.
Word Sample. 
Note that only some things work (see the sample) (JT 6.3: colored text worked for me here too. From recent discussions it appears it only sometimes works!)

properties.Test Case: drag moves element: try all canvas element types, including navigation buttons; try at multiple zoom levels, including 100%, larger, and smaller. Red guide lines should appear when elements are aligned. Movement should snap to a grid (about 10px) unless ctrl is held down.
properties.Steps: drag moves element: try all canvas element types, including navigation buttons;  try at multiple zoom levels, including 100%, larger, and smaller. Red guide lines should appear when elements are aligned. Movement should snap to a grid (about 10px) unless ctrl is held down.

properties.Test Case: Dragging corner controls resizes bubble: try all bubble types, all corners; try at multiple zoom levels. Most bubbles, including picture buttons, can be resized to any shape; but image and video overlays can only be sized in a way that preserves the aspect ratio of the picture. Again, things should snap to a grid unless ctrl is held down, and red alignment lines should show as appropriate; also green bars when the item being resized is the same height as something else. (Text bubbles are special and do not have corner handles.)
properties.Steps: Dragging corner controls resizes bubble: try all bubble types, all corners; try at multiple zoom levels. Most bubbles, including picture buttons, can be resized to any shape; but image and video overlays can only be sized in a way that preserves the aspect ratio of the picture. Again, things should snap to a grid unless ctrl is held down, and red alignment lines should show as appropriate; also green bars when the item being resized is the same height as something else. (Text bubbles are special and do not have corner handles.)

properties.Test Case: The width of a text bubble can be changed using the oval side handles. Normally the height adjusts automatically to fit the text.
properties.Steps: The width of a text bubble can be changed using the oval side handles. Normally the height adjusts automatically to fit the text.

properties.Test Case: Turn auto-height off using the ... menu below a text box. Now there should be a third handle in the middle bottom which allows the height to be manually adjusted. The box will no longer resize automatically as the side handles are moved, nor as text is typed or deleted.
